texto: Do not be a people without a will of your own saying: If others treat well you will also treat well and if they do wrong we will do wrong
autor: but accustom yourselves to do good if people do good and do not do wrong if they do evil.
explicacao: Citação de but accustom yourselves to do good if people do good and do not do wrong if they do evil. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Do not be a people without a will of your own saying: If others treat well you will also treat we…” articula reflexao, anonymous, treat em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
